primary_sources.title: Claude Code Documentation - Common Workflows
key_findings: Extended thinking enabled by default with 31,999 token budget
Phrases like 'think', 'think hard', 'ultrathink' are interpreted as regular prompt instructions
Keywords don't allocate thinking tokens
Configuration via MAX_THINKING_TOKENS environment variable
Toggle shortcuts Option+T/Alt+T for TUI only

primary_sources.title: GitHub Issue #19098 - Restore explicit ultrathink keyword
key_findings: Quality degradation reports since v2.0.x
Timeline of thinking mode changes from v1.x to v2.1.x
Community evidence of 'ultrathink no longer does anything'
Request for opt-out from smart allocation

primary_sources.title: Claude Code CHANGELOG
key_findings: v2.1.12: Fixed message rendering bug
v2.1.11: Fixed MCP connection issues
v2.1.0: Added real-time thinking block display
No explicit changelog entry for thinking budget changes

primary_sources.title: GitHub Issue #18072 - Logic conflict MAX_THINKING_TOKENS and ultrathink
key_findings: MAX_THINKING_TOKENS takes priority over ultrathink keyword
Keyword silently ignored when env var is set
Users cannot burst to higher token limit for single requests

secondary_sources.title: Decode Claude - UltraThink is Dead
key_findings: Official deprecation date: January 16, 2026
64K output models support 63,999 token budget
Hidden workaround: MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=63999
Verified against Claude Code v2.1.11

secondary_sources.title: Claude Docs - Building with Extended Thinking
key_findings: Minimum budget is 1,024 tokens
max_thinking_tokens SDK parameter controls thinking
Batch processing recommended for budgets above 32K

related_github_issues.title: Claude Does Not Follow Prompts Through Completion since 2.1.x
Significant quality degradation and inconsistent behavior
related_github_issues.relevance: Widespread reports of issues since v2.0.x

related_github_issues.title: ultrathink now enabled by default (not in CHANGELOG)
related_github_issues.relevance: Confirms silent change to thinking defaults

related_github_issues.title: Inline thinking output with MAX_THINKING_TOKENS no longer appears
